title: HOOK 2 — Pitch montage
prompt: Medium shot in @living-room. @Sara on the LEFT crouches over a notepad on the floor, drawing furiously with a purple crayon — the page shows a wobbly stack of pancakes and a vase of flowers. @Eva on the RIGHT bounces on her toes with both arms wide, eyes huge. @Papa in the CENTER smiles watching, pen tapping his chin. Sara (proud): "Pancakes, juice, and flowers from the yard!" Eva (overflowing, bouncing): "And ONE HUNDRED CHOCOLATE CAKES! And a UNICORN!" Papa (chuckling): "Maybe we start smaller."
